title: Rename repo from agent-conductor to gruai
description: Rename the GitHub repository from agent-conductor to gruai. Update active framework files only, not historical artifacts.

scope.in: Update CLAUDE.md, vision.md, lessons/, agents/*.md, server comments, package.json scripts, test fixtures
scope.out: Historical .context/reports/, completed directive artifacts, dist-* build output

dod.criterion: All active framework files reference 'gruai' instead of 'Agent Conductor' or 'agent-conductor'

tasks.title: Rename agent-conductor to gruai in core framework files
tasks.user_scenario: A developer cloning the repo sees 'gruai' branding consistently across CLAUDE.md, vision.md, and package.json scripts.
tasks.scope: Update the CLAUDE.md header from 'Agent Conductor' to 'gruai'. Update .context/vision.md title and all 'Agent Conductor' / 'agent-conductor' references. Update package.json predev script. Update .context/lessons/ path references. Update test fixtures.

dod.criterion: CLAUDE.md header reads '# gruai' instead of '# Agent Conductor'
grep -r 'agent-conductor' on CLAUDE.md, .context/vision.md, .context/lessons/, package.json, tests/ returns zero results
grep -ri 'Agent Conductor' on CLAUDE.md, .context/vision.md, .context/lessons/ returns zero results

tasks.title: Rename agent-conductor to gruai in agent definitions and server code
tasks.user_scenario: Agent definitions and server code comments consistently reference 'gruai'.
tasks.scope: Update all 7 agent definition files in .claude/agents/ to replace 'Agent Conductor' with 'gruai'. Update server/config.ts, server/platform/types.ts, and server/platform/PLATFORM-ADAPTERS.md.

dod.criterion: grep -ri 'Agent Conductor' .claude/agents/ server/ returns zero results
All 7 agent .md files contain 'gruai' where 'Agent Conductor' previously appeared

tasks.title: Verify npm package name unchanged and no regressions from rename
tasks.user_scenario: After rename, npm package still publishes as gru-ai, README works, no active functionality broken.
tasks.scope: Verify package.json name is 'gru-ai'. Run type-check. Grep entire repo for remaining references and confirm they are only in historical artifacts.

dod.criterion: grep -ri 'agent.conductor' on active files returns zero results
Remaining occurrences are exclusively in historical .context/ artifacts and dist-* directories
